en: Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability. - Edsger Dijkstra
Make it work, make it right, make it fast. - Kent Beck
First solve the problem, then write the code. - John Johnson
Good code is its own best documentation. - Steve McConnell
Small steps every day beat occasional heroic bursts.
Readable code scales better than clever code.
A good abstraction removes more pain than it adds.
Consistency is a feature users can feel.
Great systems are built by reducing surprises.
Refactoring is interest payment on design debt.
Ship value, then iterate with feedback.
Tests are guardrails, not bureaucracy.
The best optimization is deleting unnecessary work.
Naming is where design meets language.
Stable habits outperform random intensity.
zh: 简单是可靠性的前提。- Dijkstra
先跑通，再做好，再做快。- Kent Beck
先解决问题，再写代码。
好代码本身就是最好的文档。
稳定的日常投入胜过偶尔的爆发。
可读性比聪明技巧更能长期扩展。
好的抽象减少的是长期痛点。
一致性是用户能感知到的功能。
优秀系统来自减少意外行为。
重构是为设计债务付利息。
先交付价值，再基于反馈迭代。
测试是护栏，不是负担。
最好的优化往往是删掉无效工作。
命名是设计和语言的交汇点。
稳定习惯胜过随机爆发。

en: A SQL query walks into a bar and asks two tables: can I join you?
There are 10 kinds of people: those who know binary and those who don't.
A programmer is a machine that turns coffee into commits.
I would tell you a UDP joke, but you might not get it.
Why do bugs fear developers? Because they fix issues for fun.
My code does not have bugs, it develops random features.
The code worked yesterday, therefore it is production-ready.
A clean merge a day keeps conflicts away.
I renamed the variable to final_final_v2 for clarity.
The best debugger is still a good night of sleep.
404 motivation not found, retry after coffee.
I write TODOs so future me can feel accomplished.
No one expects the edge case inquisition.
The commit was small, the impact was legendary.
Cache invalidation and naming things walked into retro.
zh: 一条 SQL 走进酒吧，对两张表说：我能 join 你们吗？
世界上有 10 种人：懂二进制的和不懂二进制的。
程序员是把咖啡转换成提交记录的机器。
我本来想讲个 UDP 笑话，但不确定你能不能收到。
为什么 bug 害怕开发者？因为他们修 bug 当娱乐。
我的代码没有 bug，只是会随机进化出功能。
昨天能跑，所以今天就能上生产。
每天一次干净合并，冲突远离你。
为了清晰，我把变量改名为 final_final_v2。
最好的调试器有时是睡一觉。
404：动力未找到，请补充咖啡后重试。
我写 TODO，是为了让未来的我有成就感。
没有人能预料边界条件审判庭。
提交很小，影响很大。
缓存失效和命名问题一起参加了复盘会。

en: Tip: Keep commit messages focused on intent, not implementation details.
Tip: Smaller commits make review and rollback much easier.
Tip: If you touched logic, add or update one test in the same commit.
Tip: Refactor when context is fresh, not months later.
Tip: Leave TODOs only with owner and date.
Tip: Prefer one behavior change per commit.
Tip: Use consistent naming across modules.
Tip: Keep functions short enough to scan in one screen.
Tip: Avoid hidden side effects in utility helpers.
Tip: Treat logs as part of product UX for engineers.
Tip: Add one assertion for every bug fix.
Tip: Separate refactor commits from feature commits.
Tip: Make rollback paths explicit before risky changes.
Tip: Name branches by outcome, not ticket noise.
Tip: Stable release cadence beats random big drops.
zh: 建议：提交信息优先描述意图，而不是实现细节。
建议：小步提交更利于评审与回滚。
建议：改了逻辑就顺手补一条测试。
建议：上下文还在时就重构，不要拖到以后。
建议：TODO 最好带负责人和日期。
建议：一次提交尽量只做一个行为变化。
建议：模块间命名保持一致。
建议：函数尽量一屏可读。
建议：工具函数避免隐藏副作用。
建议：日志也是面向工程师的产品体验。
建议：每个 bug 修复至少补一个断言。
建议：重构提交与功能提交分开。
建议：做高风险改动前先确认回滚路径。
建议：分支名描述目标结果，不要噪声。
建议：稳定发布节奏优于随机大版本。

en: Challenge: Tomorrow, keep each commit under 15 changed files.
Challenge: Write one commit message with clear problem + solution.
Challenge: Remove one dead function before adding new code.
Challenge: Add one regression test for a bug you fixed this week.
Challenge: Do one review-focused commit with only refactor changes.
Challenge: Close one TODO older than 30 days.
Challenge: Replace one magic number with a named constant.
Challenge: Split one large commit into two smaller logical commits.
Challenge: Add docs for one module that lacks context.
Challenge: Reduce one function by at least 20 lines today.
Challenge: Improve one error message seen by teammates.
Challenge: Remove one unused dependency or import.
Challenge: Add one benchmark or timing log to hot code.
Challenge: Improve one test name so intent is obvious.
Challenge: End day with a clean status and one clear plan note.
zh: 挑战：明天把每次提交控制在 15 个文件以内。
挑战：写一条包含“问题+方案”的高质量提交信息。
挑战：新增功能前先删掉一个无用函数。
挑战：给本周修复的一个 bug 增加回归测试。
挑战：做一次仅包含重构改动的评审友好提交。
挑战：关闭一个超过 30 天的 TODO。
挑战：把一个魔法数字替换为具名常量。
挑战：把一次大提交拆成两次逻辑提交。
挑战：为一个缺文档模块补上说明。
挑战：今天把一个函数减少至少 20 行。
挑战：优化一条同事常见到的错误提示。
挑战：删除一个未使用依赖或导入。
挑战：给热点代码增加一个基准或耗时日志。
挑战：改进一个测试名称，让意图更清晰。
挑战：收工前保持工作区干净并写一条计划备注。
